Proportion of immature reticulocytes; early marker of erythropoiesis.
Absolute count of nucleated RBCs in blood; indicates marrow stress or severe disease.
Percentage of nucleated RBCs among white cells.
Average size of reticulocytes; reflects red cell production dynamics.
Proportion of immature granulocytes in white blood cells.
Measures blood's capacity to bind iron; assesses iron status.
Measures transferrin protein involved in iron transport.
Measures folate level; important in DNA synthesis and anemia evaluation.
Total globulin proteins in blood; supports immune and inflammatory assessment.
Separates serum proteins into fractions; detects monoclonal proteins or inflammation.
Measures circulating insulin; evaluates glucose metabolism and diabetes.
Therapeutic drug level monitoring for valproic acid.
Free triiodothyronine level; evaluates thyroid function.
Free thyroxine level; evaluates thyroid function.
Measures progesterone hormone; used in fertility and pregnancy assessment.
Measures estradiol hormone; evaluates ovarian and reproductive function.
Measures testosterone level; evaluates gonadal function.
Assesses ovarian reserve and fertility potential.
Measures cortisol hormone; assesses adrenal function and stress response.
Microbiological culture of cervical sample to detect infections.
Microscopic examination of fresh specimen for parasites or infections.
Determines fungal organism sensitivity to antifungal medications.
Quantitative measurement of human papillomavirus 16 DNA viral load in plasma cell-free DNA.
Counts cells in ascitic fluid; helps differentiate transudative from exudative ascites and detect infection.

Microscopic Gram staining of ascitic fluid to rapidly detect bacteria.

Measures vitamin D level; evaluates bone health and deficiency.
Drug susceptibility testing for M. tuberculosis to first-line and second-line antituberculosis drugs.
